title: Secure Azure Key Vault with defense in depth for the cloud and AI workloads
summary: Implement a defense-in-depth security strategy for Azure Key Vault. Configure hardened vault settings, control access through RBAC and just-in-time privilege, manage keys, secrets, and certificates, and detect threats using Microsoft Defender for Key Vault and Defender CSPM.

sections.title: Secure Azure Key Vault with defense in depth for the cloud and AI workloads
sections.summary: Implement a defense-in-depth security strategy for Azure Key Vault. Configure hardened vault settings, control access through RBAC and just-in-time privilege, manage keys, secrets, and certificates, and detect threats using Microsoft Defender for Key Vault and Defender CSPM.

lessons.title: Configure and secure Azure Key Vault
lessons.content_md:
Configure a security-hardened Azure Key Vault for enterprise workloads. Apply soft delete and purge protection, enforce least-privilege RBAC access with just-in-time activation, and secure the network perimeter using firewall rules and private endpoints.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/configure-secure-key-vault/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Configure and secure Azure Key Vault

lessons.title: Manage keys and secrets in Azure Key Vault
lessons.content_md:
Manage the security lifecycle of cryptographic keys and secrets in Azure Key Vault. Configure HSM-backed keys, implement BYOK, automate key rotation, and build zero-downtime secret rotation using dual-credential patterns.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/manage-keys-secrets-key-vault/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Manage keys and secrets in Azure Key Vault

lessons.title: Manage certificates and monitor Azure Key Vault
lessons.content_md:
Manage certificate lifecycle in Azure Key Vault through integrated CA issuance and autorenewal, and enable diagnostic logging to create an investigation-ready audit trail for security operations.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/manage-certificates-monitor-key-vault/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Manage certificates and monitor Azure Key Vault

lessons.title: Protect Azure Key Vault with Microsoft Defender for Cloud
lessons.content_md:
Protect Azure Key Vault with Microsoft Defender for Cloud. Use Defender Cloud Security Posture Management (CSPM) agentless secret scanning to discover exposed credentials, enable Microsoft Defender for Key Vault to detect malicious access patterns, and respond effectively to Key Vault security alerts.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/defend-key-vault-defender-cloud/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Protect Azure Key Vault with Microsoft Defender for Cloud

labs.title: Laboratorio opcional: aplica Secure Azure Key Vault with defense in depth for the cloud and AI workloads
labs.instructions_md: Lleva a la practica lo aprendido en **Secure Azure Key Vault with defense in depth for the cloud and AI workloads**. Implementa un escenario pequeno y documenta tu solucion. Este laboratorio es opcional pero refuerza la retencion.

rubric.description: La solucion cumple el objetivo del laboratorio.
La explicacion es comprensible y ordenada.
